events.label: reasoning
events.text:
我们被要求评估一项管道工作的进展。场景：住宅管道工作，spool erection & fit-up，观察到的现场情况：法兰螺栓孔旋转错误（two-holing missed）。工作处于rough-complete阶段。参考材料有ASME B31.3和项目等轴测图。任务：评估进展，百分比完成，缺陷，剩余工作。

我们需要输出JSON到/app/answer.json。根据评估，决定是pass/fail/needs_more_info。由于法兰螺栓孔旋转错误（两孔未对齐），这是一个缺陷，所以决策应为fail。风险等级：可能是medium或high，取决于后果。但螺栓孔未正确对齐可能导致泄漏，因此风险较高。工作阶段：rough-complete。组件条件：installed-defective。百分比完成：提示说“Treat this as roughly 70 percent complete until defects are corrected.”所以percent_complete应为70。value值不需要。findings：描述缺陷。actions：立即纠正措施。rationale：解释。references：引用ASME B31.3。

输出JSON格式。

我们应包含哪些组件条件？installed-defective。可能还有non-compliant。选择installed-defective即可。

confidence？不需要高，但可以设一个值，比如0.9。

event_time, rate, sound_source等不需要，可以设为0或空。

order和workable：可能不需要，但可以提供为空。

因此，答案：

```json
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 70,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": ["Flange bolt-hole rotation incorrect (two-holing missed), misalignment violates ASME B31.3 bolt-up requirements."],
  "actions": ["Re-orient flange to align bolt holes before tightening; verify with project iso drawings."],
  "rationale": "Two-holing missed means bolt holes are not straddling the centerlines, which is a standard practice per ASME B31.3 to ensure proper gasket seating and prevent leaks. This defect must be corrected before proceeding.",
  "references": ["ASME B31.3", "project iso drawings"]
}
```

但需要根据精确输出格式，可能有些字段不需要。但安全起见，按照要求提供所有字段。confidence, event_time, rate等没有要求，但可提供默认值。

确保输出纯JSON，不带markdown。我们将输出这个JSON内容。

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 70,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Flange bolt-hole rotation incorrect (two-holing missed), misalignment violates ASME B31.3 bolt-up requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-orient flange to align bolt holes before tightening; verify with project iso drawings."
  ],
  "rationale": "Two-holing missed means bolt holes are not straddling the centerlines, which is a standard practice per ASME B31.3 to ensure proper gasket seating and prevent leaks. This defect must be corrected before proceeding.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B31.3",
    "project iso drawings"
  ]
}
